title: News Evangelion News Update for Winter 2017
display_title: News Evangelion News Update for Winter 2017
wikitext:
[]: [News] Evangelion News Update for Winter 2017             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 10, 2017 8:26 pm Hey kids, I'm back with another news update: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ea-P3CnUin0 In this installment, I recap the confirmation of the production of Evangelion 3.0+1.0, Studio khara's lawsuit against Studio Gainax, the Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony Concert Event, and more. Please give it a look!

[]: Re: [News] Evangelion News Update for Winter 2017             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Sun Feb 19, 2017 12:37 am Didn't know about that font thing...really wish I knew where to follow through on...Japanese font design...
